leadText: The Cleanse Tag (Japanese: きよめのおふだ Purification Ofuda) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II. It decreases the wild Pokémon encounter rate if held by the player's Pokémon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation II 1.2 Generation III to IV 1.3 Generation V onward Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation II [ edit | edit source ] If held by any member in the player 's party , it halves the encounter rate of wild Pokémon . Generation III to IV [ edit | edit source ] If held by the first member in the player's party, it decreases the encounter rate of wild Pokémon by one third. It also works if the holder has fainted . Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] Cleanse Tag's encounter rate reduction does not apply if it is held by a Pokémon with Illuminate , Arena Trap , No Guard , Stench , White Smoke , or Quick Feet , or if the Pokémon has Sand Veil or Snow Cloak and the appropriate weather condition is in effect. However, Cleanse Tag is still cumulative with the overworld effects of Intimidate and Keen Eye .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Helps repel wild Pok é mon . (HOLD) R S E A hold item that helps repel wild Pok é mon . FR LG An item to be held by a Pok é mon . It repels wild Pok é mon if the holder is first in the party. Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It helps keep wild Pokémon away if the holder is the first one in the party. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It helps keep wild Pokémon away if the holder is the head of the party. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. It helps keep wild Pokémon away when the holder is the head of the party.
